title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!
